title: Craft Light
description: With the mod you can craft a block of light from a torch. It is useful that the torches do not spoil the beauty of the project.
body:
Craft Light is a mod that will add a light block recipe to the game. It shines well, but has no appearance! You can replace the torches that spoil the appearance of your project with light blocks that will illuminate your project without external problems! By Replayer
_(P.S. the mod does not add the light block itself, it can be obtained with the /give command, the mod only adds crafting)_

[Discord](https://discord.gg/KnPu8YA2Jj)
